description: Get the local player's current locked target (with weapons that can lock on).
examples:
<sqf>
playerTargetLock params ["_target", "_lock", "_cfg"];
if (_lock == 1) then
{
	hint format ["%1 locked %2", getText (_cfg >> "displayName"), getText (configOf _target >> "displayName")];
};
</sqf>
<sqf>playerTargetLock; // returns [objNull, 0, configNull] if no lock is being done</sqf>
name: playerTargetLock

ArraySized.desc: in range 0..1 where 1 is fully locked
ArraySized.name: lockValue
